Launch Email Sequence

Complete email cadence for Kickstarter launch week - Day 1 through Day 14

Launch Week Email Cadence

EMAIL 1: Launch Morning (Day 1 - Feb 15, 7:00 AM PT)

VIP Segment (Early Access - 1 Hour Lead)

From: Alex Chen at HeyZack
Subject A: We’re live—VIP hour starts now
Subject B: Your early access is active (one hour head start)
Preheader: $799 early bird pricing—500 spots available

Body:

[First Name],

We’re live.

Your VIP hour started at 7:00 AM PT. You have until 8:00 AM before the public launch.

👉 Back HeyZack Now

Early Bird Starter Kit: $799 (40% off retail $1,332)
Limited to first 500 backers

✓ One app controls everything
✓ AI learns your habits
✓ 15-30% energy savings
✓ No monthly fees
✓ Ships June 2026

You’ve been waiting for this. Don’t let analysis paralysis cost you $533.

— Alex

[BUTTON: Secure My Early Bird Spot]

Main Segment (Public Launch - 8:00 AM PT)

From: Alex Chen at HeyZack
Subject A: HeyZack is live on Kickstarter
Subject B: We just launched (early bird pricing active)
Preheader: $799 for limited time—500 early bird spots available

Body:

[First Name],

After months of development and testing, HeyZack is live on Kickstarter.

Early Bird Starter Kit: $799 (retail: $1,332)

One app. No monthly fees. Actually learns your habits.

👉 Back the Campaign

Fair warning: We have 2,400+ people on the waitlist and only 500 early bird spots. First-come, first-served.

See you on the campaign page,

— Alex

[BUTTON: Get Early Bird Pricing]

EMAIL 2: Launch Evening (Day 1 - Feb 15, 5:00 PM PT)

From: Alex Chen at HeyZack
Subject A: Update: 347 early bird spots left
Subject B: Early bird pricing selling faster than expected
Preheader: Real-time update on remaining availability

Body:

Quick update:

Early bird spots remaining: 347 of 500

We launched 10 hours ago. If the current pace holds, early bird sells out by tomorrow afternoon.

After 500, price increases to $999.

Current pricing: $799 (saves you $533 vs. retail)

👉 Secure Your Spot

Not trying to pressure you—just wanted you to have the real numbers.

— Alex

[BUTTON: Lock In $799 Pricing]

P.S. — Most common question today: “Does it really work with my existing Nest thermostat?” Yes. Full compatibility list on the campaign page.

EMAIL 3: Day 2 Extension (Feb 16, 8:00 AM PT)

From: Alex Chen at HeyZack
Subject A: Early bird extended through tonight (here’s why)
Subject B: 24-hour extension—what happened yesterday
Preheader: Server issues affected some backers, extending VIP pricing through 11:59 PM PT

Body:

[First Name],

Transparent update:

Yesterday during launch, Kickstarter’s servers had intermittent issues between 9:15-10:45 AM PT. Some of you got error messages when trying to back, and we received emails from frustrated supporters who couldn’t complete their pledges.

So we’re extending early bird pricing through tonight (11:59 PM PT, Feb 16).

Current spots remaining: 178 of 500

This gives everyone who had technical issues a fair shot, and gives anyone else who was on the fence an extra day to decide.

👉 Back at $799 (Until Midnight Tonight)

After tonight, we’re moving to regular backer pricing ($999) regardless of how many early bird slots remain. We want to be fair to the people who backed yesterday despite the server issues.

— Alex

[BUTTON: Claim Extended Early Bird]

EMAIL 4: Day 3 - Reason #2 (Feb 17, 8:00 AM PT)

From: Alex Chen at HeyZack
Subject A: Top reason #2: “My partner actually uses it”
Subject B: Why non-tech partners love HeyZack
Preheader: Spouse acceptance factor—the feature nobody talks about but everyone needs

Body:

[First Name],

We asked our beta testers: “What’s the #1 thing that surprised you about HeyZack?”

#2 most common answer: “My non-tech spouse/partner actually uses it without asking me for help.”

Tyler (Seattle) said: “My wife tried our old SmartThings setup exactly once, got frustrated with the interface, and never touched it again. I became the house IT guy. With HeyZack, she uses it daily—voice commands, the app, everything. That’s when I knew we’d built something different.”

Margaret (Dallas, 68 years old) said: “I’m not technical. I barely use my iPhone. But I can control my whole house now—the app just makes sense. My grandson set it up, but I don’t need him anymore.”

Why this matters:

A smart home only works if everyone in the house can actually use it. If your partner hates it, you’ll end up turning it all off in six months.

We designed HeyZack for Tyler’s wife and Margaret—not for engineers.

See how it works: 👇

Back HeyZack Now

Current tally: $347,000 raised from 612 backers in 2 days.

— Alex

[BUTTON: Watch the Interface Demo]

P.S. — Regular backer pricing ($999) is still 25% off retail ($1,332). Campaign runs through March 30th.

EMAIL 5: Day 5 - Reason #1 + Press (Feb 19, 8:00 AM PT)

From: Alex Chen at HeyZack
Subject A: The Verge: “HeyZack actually delivers on smart home promises”
Subject B: Press coverage + top reason to back
Preheader: Tech media reviews are in—plus the #1 feature beta testers mention

Body:

[First Name],

The press coverage started rolling in yesterday.

The Verge: “HeyZack takes aim at smart home fragmentation… and actually delivers. After 60 days of testing, we’re impressed.”

Ars Technica: “The AI genuinely learns behavioral patterns—not just ‘if-then’ timers marketed as intelligence. Energy savings increased from 18% in month one to 29% by month three.”

TechCrunch: “Property managers get enterprise building management at 95% lower cost. Homeowners get the unified ecosystem they’ve been promised for a decade.”

Full reviews linked on our campaign page.

But Here’s the #1 Reason Beta Testers Backed:

“It saves me actual money—I can see it on my energy bill.”

Emma (Portland) tracks every dollar. She was skeptical.

Before HeyZack: $210/month average electric bill
After HeyZack: $163/month average (first 6 months)
Annual savings: $564

Her system cost $799. Payback: 17 months.

After that? Pure profit. Every year. For as long as she owns the house.

That’s the difference between marketing claims and measured results.

👉 See More Beta Results

We’re at $521,000 raised from 891 backers.

— Alex

[BUTTON: Back HeyZack Now]

P.S. — Campaign update #3 dropped yesterday with behind-the-scenes manufacturing photos. Check it out on the campaign page.

EMAIL 6: Day 7 Week Wrap (Feb 21, 8:00 AM PT)

From: Alex Chen at HeyZack
Subject A: One week in: $680K raised (thank you)
Subject B: Week 1 wrap-up + new shipping timeline
Preheader: Campaign progress, backer questions answered, and what’s next

Body:

[First Name],

One week in, and I’m honestly blown away.

$680,000 raised from 1,247 backers.

That’s 1,360% of our $50,000 goal. You’ve validated years of work.

What We’ve Learned This Week:

Top Question: “Can I add devices later?”
Answer: Yes. Start with the Starter Kit, add cameras/sensors/switches anytime. The ecosystem scales with you.

Second Most Asked: “What if I already have a Nest thermostat?”
Answer: HeyZack integrates with it. You don’t have to replace anything. Compatibility list on campaign page.

Third: “How long does setup really take?”
Answer: We’ve now timed 47 beta users. Average: 34 minutes for the full Starter Kit. Fastest: 19 minutes. Slowest: 58 minutes (user was 71 years old, first smart home device).

Updated Shipping Timeline:

With current backer numbers, we’re accelerating production:

  • First 500 backers: June 2026 (unchanged)
  • Backers 501-1,500: July 2026 (was August)
  • Backers 1,501+: August 2026

You’ll get your specific shipping estimate in your backer survey after the campaign closes.

Why This Still Matters (If You Haven’t Backed Yet):

Benefit #1: Energy savings
Average: $47/month. That’s $564/year. Forever.

Benefit #2: Time savings
No more app-juggling. No more “Did I lock the door?” anxiety. No more being the household IT department.

Benefit #3: Actual intelligence
AI that improves over time. Month 1: 18% savings. Month 6: 28% savings. It learns.

Benefit #4: No lock-in
Open protocols. If you hate us, you can migrate. We don’t trap customers—we earn loyalty.

👉 Back HeyZack Now

Current pricing: $999 (25% off retail $1,332)

Only $333 more than early bird pricing—and we’re shipping 2 months ahead of original schedule.

Thank you for believing in this,

— Alex Chen & The HeyZack Team

[BUTTON: Join 1,247 Backers]

EMAIL 7: Day 10 Social Proof Surge (Feb 24, 8:00 AM PT)

From: Alex Chen at HeyZack
Subject A: Property manager just backed 30 units
Subject B: Commercial adoption update + new testimonials
Preheader: B2B operators joining the campaign—Patricia’s portfolio case study

Body:

[First Name],

Something cool happened yesterday.

Patricia (property manager from Austin) backed 30 units—one for each building in her portfolio.

She commented on the campaign:

“I spent 6 months getting quotes from Honeywell, Johnson Controls, Siemens. Lowest bid: $1.2M for 30 buildings ($40K per building). HeyZack: $150K total. Same functionality. I control it myself. No vendor service contracts. This is a no-brainer.”

She’s our first commercial operator to publicly commit on Kickstarter.

But here’s what’s interesting: 42 other property managers have backed since Patricia’s comment (we can see the pledge notes).

For commercial operators:

The math changes everything when you control your own infrastructure:

  • Traditional BMS: $1.2M upfront + $450K (30 × $15K/year service fees over 3 years) = $1.65M total
  • HeyZack: $150K upfront + $0 service fees = $150K total
  • Savings: $1.5M over 3 years

Plus 20-30% energy savings = $250K-$375K additional savings over 3 years.

ROI: 4-6 months.

For homeowners:

You’re not managing 30 buildings. But the principle is the same:

Don’t pay for vendor lock-in. Don’t pay monthly subscriptions. Own your infrastructure.

👉 Back HeyZack

We’re at $847,000 from 1,531 backers.

— Alex

[BUTTON: Join Patricia & 1,531 Others]

EMAIL 8: Day 14 Midpoint Momentum (Feb 28, 8:00 AM PT)

From: Alex Chen at HeyZack
Subject A: Halfway through the campaign: $1.1M raised
Subject B: 2 weeks in + new stretch goals announced
Preheader: Campaign midpoint update, stretch goals unlocked, manufacturing timeline

Body:

[First Name],

We’re halfway through the campaign (2 weeks down, 2 weeks to go).

$1,124,000 raised from 2,018 backers.

That’s 2,248% of our goal.

What This Means:

Stretch Goal #1 (Unlocked at $1M): Free upgraded hub for all backers

  • Faster processor
  • More local storage
  • Better range
  • Same price

Stretch Goal #2 (Announced Today): If we hit $1.5M, all Starter Kit backers get a free bonus door/window sensor (2-pack, $49 value)

Stretch Goal #3 (Announced Today): If we hit $2M, we’re adding Matter 1.2 certification ahead of schedule (originally planned for 2027)

New Backer Testimonial (Posted Yesterday):

Jason (Phoenix, IT Director at a hospital):

“I manage building automation at a 400-bed hospital. I backed HeyZack for my house to test it before proposing it for our facility. Setup took me 31 minutes. I’m a systems architect—I’ve deployed every major BMS platform. HeyZack is shockingly good for the price point. If the commercial-grade components hold up, we’re replacing our Honeywell system.”

That’s the validation we needed. Healthcare facility-grade expectations, consumer-friendly price.

For Those Still Deciding:

Current pricing: $999 (Regular Backer tier)
Retail price (Q4 2026): $1,332

This is still 25% off—and you’re getting the upgraded hub free.

👉 Back HeyZack Now

Two weeks left. Let’s hit those stretch goals.

— Alex

[BUTTON: Unlock Stretch Goal #2]
